title: Discipline of students; nonpublic schools; disciplinary authority
doc_html:
§416.22. Discipline of students; nonpublic schools; disciplinary authority

            The use of any form of corporal punishment is prohibited in any nonpublic school that receives state funds except as authorized in R.S. 17:416.1(B).

            Acts 2023, No. 268, §1.
doc_text:
§416.22.  Discipline of students; nonpublic schools; disciplinary authority
The use of any form of corporal punishment is prohibited in any nonpublic school
that receives state funds except as authorized in R.S. 17:416.1(B).
Acts 2023, No. 268, §1.
